heading: Supervisory actions applicable to level III
label: 2279bb–6 Supervisory actions applicable to level III

children.heading: Capital restoration plan
children.label: 1 Capital restoration plan
children.text: If the Corporation is classified as within level III, the Corporation shall, within the time period determined by the Director, submit to the Director a capital restoration plan and, after approval, carry out the plan.

children.label: i
children.text: may not make any payment of dividends that would result in the Corporation being reclassified as within level IV; and

children.label: ii
children.text: may make any other payment of dividends only if the Director approves the payment before the payment.

children.heading: Standard for approval
children.label: B Standard for approval
children.text: If the Corporation is classified as within level III, the Director may approve a payment of dividends by the Corporation only if the Director determines that the payment (i) will enhance the ability of the Corporation to meet the risk-based capital level and the minimum capital level promptly, (ii) will contribute to the long-term safety and soundness of the Corporation, or (iii) is otherwise in the public interest.

children.heading: Reclassification from level III to level IV
children.label: 3 Reclassification from level III to level IV
A
children.text: the Corporation is classified as within level III; and

children.label: i
children.text: the Corporation does not submit a capital restoration plan that is approved by the Director; or

children.label: ii
children.text: the Director determines that the Corporation has failed to make, in good faith, reasonable efforts necessary to comply with such a capital restoration plan and fulfill the schedule for the plan approved by the Director.

children.heading: Limitation on increase in obligations
children.label: 1 Limitation on increase in obligations
children.text: Limit any increase in, or order the reduction of, any obligations of the Corporation, including off-balance sheet obligations.

children.heading: Limitation on growth
children.label: 2 Limitation on growth
children.text: Limit or prohibit the growth of the assets of the Corporation or require contraction of the assets of the Corporation.

children.heading: Prohibition on dividends
children.label: 3 Prohibition on dividends
children.text: Prohibit the Corporation from making any payment of dividends.

children.heading: Acquisition of new capital
children.label: 4 Acquisition of new capital
children.text: Require the Corporation to acquire new capital in any form and in any amount sufficient to provide for the reclassification of the Corporation as within level II.

children.heading: Restriction of activities
children.label: 5 Restriction of activities
children.text: Require the Corporation to terminate, reduce, or modify any activity that the Director determines creates excessive risk to the Corporation.

children.heading: Conservatorship
children.label: 6 Conservatorship
children.text: Appoint a conservator for the Corporation consistent with this chapter.

children.heading: Effective date
children.label: c Effective date
children.text: This section shall take effect on .January 1, 1992
